source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for sturdy dashboards and dense operational UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese labels, compact metrics, calm line height, and reliable multilingual readability.
layout: Dense 8px-grid data layouts with broad navigation rails, thick rounded headers, hippo-skin texture accents, stable table regions, quiet shadows, and river-pool contrast translated across light and dark mode.

prompts.label: Transparent Hippopotamus motif
prompts.workflow: Built-in image generation on flat #00ff00 chroma key, then local remove_chroma_key.py alpha extraction with border auto-key, soft matte, and despill.
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Hippopotamus transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated hippopotamus motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A single adult hippopotamus in a calm three-quarter standing pose, full body visible, heavy rounded mass, broad muzzle, small ears, low-set eyes, thick folded hide with believable hippo skin texture. Color language: mauve grey skin with subtle water-green reflections and mud-brown creases, wet but not shiny plastic, sturdy and grounded. The motif should feel like a heavy data system inspired by river pools: stable, dense, reliable, and powerful.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full silhouette including feet, tail, ears, muzzle, and body without cropping; one hippopotamus only.
Lighting/mood: clean studio lighting that preserves skin folds, rounded volumes, quiet strength, and crisp silhouette edges.
Transparent workflow: place the hippopotamus on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Keep the hippopotamus fully separated from the background with crisp edges and generous padding. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no water scene, no riverbank, no grass, no mud floor, no other animals, no cartoon styling, no open mouth aggression, no text, no watermark, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board for /systems/morphous-hippopotamus/design-system-light.png
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive 16:9 light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Hippopotamus" / "Hippopotamus", a heavy data system derived from the visible hippopotamus motif. The board is the implementation reference for a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent hippopotamus cutout as the source of truth. Extract palette, skin-fold texture, rounded mass, river-pool calm, mud-bank grounding, heavy reliable data mood, contrast, spacing rhythm, and interaction language from the motif image. The board must visibly respect the motif colors: hippo skin mauve grey, water green, mud brown, river silt, pale mist, deep pool charcoal, muted pink skin folds.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, target 3840 x 2160 pixels, 4K-class composition.
Resolution and legibility: make every section label large and readable after gallery downscaling. Use fewer large rows, no dense tiny token tables, clean grid, generous spacing.
Required visible sections with exactly these short labels: Morphous Hippopotamus, Hippopotamus, Light Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese guidance. Show concise examples: Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics, 日本語, 余白, 可読性, 行間. Use sturdy data-system type hierarchy with compact metrics and calm readable labels.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command menu, left sidebar navigation, top navigation, dense dashboard metric cards, line chart, stacked bar chart, activity heatmap, data table, loading, empty, error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Visual details: pale river-mist background, mauve-grey and silt surfaces, deep pool charcoal text, water-green primary actions, mud-brown secondary controls, muted pink skin-fold accents, thick rounded card headers, broad stable navigation rails, subtle hippo-skin pore/fold texture, dense but organized heavy data dashboard layout, 8px radius with occasional 12px large panels.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no paragraphs. Use exact title text "Morphous Hippopotamus".
Constraints: no cartoon animal mascot, no zoo scene, no tropical illustration, no generic purple gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no tiny illegible text, no random logos, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Hippopotamus".

prompts.label: Dark design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board for /systems/morphous-hippopotamus/design-system-dark.png
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive 16:9 dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Hippopotamus" / "Hippopotamus". It must feel like the same system translated from the visible light-mode Morphous Hippopotamus board and the same hippopotamus motif, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent hippopotamus motif and visible light board as references. Preserve motif-derived palette roles, hippo skin-fold texture, river-pool calm, heavy data-system layout, spacing, typography, and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage. Translate pale river-mist surfaces into deep pool charcoal and wet-stone panels, with mist foreground, water-green primary, mud-brown controls, mauve-grey surfaces, and muted pink skin-fold accents.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, target 3840 x 2160 pixels, 4K-class composition.
Resolution and legibility: make every section label large and readable after gallery downscaling. Use fewer large rows, no dense tiny token tables, clean grid, generous spacing.
Required visible sections with exactly these short labels: Morphous Hippopotamus, Hippopotamus, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese guidance. Show concise examples: Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics, 日本語, 余白, 可読性, 行間. Use sturdy data-system type hierarchy with compact metrics and calm readable labels.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command menu, left sidebar navigation, top navigation, dense dashboard metric cards, line chart, stacked bar chart, activity heatmap, data table, loading, empty, error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Visual details: deep pool charcoal background, dark wet-stone cards, water-green primary actions, moss-green focus rings, mud-brown secondary controls, mauve-grey panel fills, muted pink warning/data accents, thick rounded card headers, broad stable navigation rails, subtle hippo-skin pore/fold texture, dense but organized heavy data dashboard layout, 8px radius with occasional 12px large panels.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no paragraphs. Use exact title text "Morphous Hippopotamus".
Constraints: no cartoon animal mascot, no zoo scene, no tropical illustration, no flat pure-black-only background, no generic purple gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no tiny illegible text, no random logos, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Hippopotamus".
